name: Bunny Patch Dessert
recipeIngredient: 10 ozs Fat-Free Pound Cake, cut into 10 slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Line the bottom of a 12 x 8 inches baking pan with cake slices.
2. Top with strawberry pie filling and all of the whipped topping.
3. Refrigerate for 1 hour or until ready to serve.
4. Tint coconut pale green using food coloring.
5. Sprinkle over the center of the whipped topping.
6. Decorate with jelly beans and Marshmallow Bunnies®.
